article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.5. Attachment 2 - 2024 SVT Technical Briefing 2026.01.27_.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider BC Speculation and Vacancy Tax Technical Briefing for 2024
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to review a provincial technical briefing on the Speculation and Vacancy Tax (SVT) — a yearly tax on homes left empty or owned by non-residents — covering 2024 results and upcoming rate increases taking effect in January 2026.
briefs.action_required: If you own vacant or secondary property in BC, check the new SVT rates taking effect January 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Speculation and Vacancy Tax increased rates take effect

briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Finance & Insurance, Construction & Development
